Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpeona Duces Tecum Of Records - S.F. Public Utilities Commission
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS THOMAS O'KANE and SHARON O'KANE's Motion To Quash Subpeona Duces Tecum Of Records - S.F. Public Utilities Commission:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO QUASH THE SUPOENA DUCE TECUM FOR RECORDS - SF PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH IT APPEARS THAT NO SUCH RECORDS EXIST, DEFENDANT IS NOT REQUIRED TO ACCEPT PLAINTIFFS' ASSERTION THAT NO SUCH RECORDS EXIST. BECAUSE OF THE LIMITED SCOPE OF THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS NO SIGNIFICANT BURDEN IS PLACED ON THE PUC TO RESPOND. THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AT THIS TIME.

Counsel for Defendant is required to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Order To Show Cause For Issuance Of Preliminary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via CourtCall:
Paul Caleo, Esq., 510-835-6809, appearing for Walgreen's Inc., Defendant
James Green, Esq., 415-621-1501, appearing in person for Thomas O'Kane, Plaintiff

ARGUED.

The Court stated that it's tenative ruling was have Mr. Caleo file a declaration by 8:30a.m. today. Mr. Caleo stated that he did not see the tentative until 4:00 p.m. on Friday, that he did not have enough time and that he will be avle to file one by close of business today. The Court informed Mr. Caleo that he could have filed a decleration descirbing his efforts on his attempts to comply with the tentative ruling.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause For Issuance Of Preliminary And Permanent Injunction is granted. Order for the same submitted for review. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
